title: Who is Asaba Jumah? (Key Facts, Biography, and Movies)
text:
Who is Asaba Jumah? (Key Facts, Biography, and Movies)


Asaba Jumah is a Ugandan actor and digital creator known for appearing in films such as Raja Shivaji, Who Killed Captain Alex 2, and November Tear. He is building his career through acting and a growing online presence.

--- 

📌 Key Facts About Asaba Jumah

- Full Name: Asaba Jumah
- Profession: Actor, Digital Creator
- Nationality: Ugandan
- Known For: Acting in film projects
- Notable Movies:
  - Raja Shivaji
  - Who Killed Captain Alex 2
  - November Tear
- Industry: Film and Entertainment

---

🎬 Movies and Acting Career

Asaba Jumah is an emerging Ugandan actor who has been involved in multiple film projects. His work includes appearances in Raja Shivaji, Who Killed Captain Alex 2, and November Tear. These roles contribute to his growing experience and demonstrate his commitment to building a career in acting.

By participating in different productions, he is developing his skills and expanding his presence within the film industry.

---

🌐 Online Profiles

Asaba Jumah maintains a digital presence across several platforms where his work and updates can be found:

👉 IMDb: https://m.imdb.com/name/nm18243050/

👉 Facebook: https://facebook.com/djfelixpro
👉 X (Twitter): https://x.com/asabajumah
👉 Instagram: https://instagram.com/djfelixpro
👉 TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@felixpro.space

These platforms help create a consistent identity and allow audiences to follow his journey.

---

📈 Why Asaba Jumah is Gaining Attention

Asaba Jumah is gaining attention due to his combination of acting experience and digital visibility. In today’s entertainment industry, actors who maintain a strong online presence are more likely to be discovered.

By continuing to work on film projects and expand his digital footprint, he is positioning himself as a rising talent in Uganda’s entertainment space.

---

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

Who is Asaba Jumah?

Asaba Jumah is a Ugandan actor known for films like Raja Shivaji, Who Killed Captain Alex 2, and November Tear.

What movies has Asaba Jumah acted in?

He has acted in Raja Shivaji, Who Killed Captain Alex 2, and November Tear.

Where can I find Asaba Jumah online?

You can find him on IMDb and social media platforms including Facebook, X (Twitter), Instagram, and TikTok.

---

📝 Summary

Asaba Jumah is a Ugandan actor building his career through film and digital platforms. With a growing list of movie credits and an expanding online presence, he continues to develop as an emerging talent in the entertainment industry.
